name: First Bank of the Lake
description_short: First Bank of the Lake is a nationwide SBA lender ranked in the top 1% that has funded over $2 billion in small business loans since 2020, specializing in SBA 7(a), 504, and franchise financing.
description_long:
First Bank of the Lake operates as a specialized SBA lender serving small business owners across the United States. Founded with a focus on small business financing, the company has established itself as a major player in the SBA lending space, offering both traditional bank services and specialized business loan products. The company maintains multiple points of contact, with dedicated SBA loan specialists (888-828-5689) and a general banking line (888-828-0167) to serve their diverse clientele.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of business financing products centered on SBA-backed loans, including SBA 7(a) loans, SBA 504 loans, SBA Working Capital loans, and USDA loans. Beyond traditional SBA products, they provide franchise financing, equipment financing, commercial real estate loans, construction loans, business acquisition financing, debt refinancing, and working capital solutions. Their lending extends across 20+ industry verticals including healthcare practices (dental, optometry, medical), professional services, hospitality, manufacturing, and retail. They also offer traditional banking services including business checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, and personal banking products.

First Bank of the Lake distinguishes itself through several claimed accomplishments: ranked in the top 1% of SBA lenders nationwide, ranked a top 3 SBA franchise lender with over $600 million in franchise loans funded, and having funded over 2,000 loans totaling more than $2 billion since 2020. Customer testimonials highlight responsive service from named staff members and a consultative approach focused on business success rather than just loan processing. The company provides educational resources including loan guides, industry-specific loan articles, case studies, and comparison tools (7a vs 504 loans).

While the website demonstrates substantial lending volume and specialization, borrowers should note that specific interest rates, APRs, terms, and qualification requirements are not disclosed on the public website—these details would require direct contact. The company appears to focus on SBA-guaranteed lending rather than unsecured or alternative business financing products. Customer reviews are positive but limited in scope on the available page, and no information about approval timelines, turnaround times, or minimum loan amounts is provided.
services: Business Savings and Money Market Accounts
pros: Ranked in top 1% of SBA lenders nationwide with over $2 billion funded since 2020
Ranked top 3 SBA franchise lender with $600+ million in franchise loans funded
Offers 20+ industry-specific loan products (dental practices, restaurants, construction, etc.)
Multiple loan structures available: SBA 7(a), 504, Working Capital, USDA, and franchise loans
Provides free pre-qualification assessment that takes 3 minutes to complete
Strong customer testimonials emphasizing staff responsiveness and genuine business support
Comprehensive educational resources including loan guides, case studies, and product comparisons
cons: No interest rates, APRs, or specific terms disclosed on website—requires direct contact
Minimum loan amounts and qualification requirements not specified publicly
Limited customer reviews visible on website (only 2 partial testimonials shown)
No information provided on approval timelines, funding speed, or typical turnaround times
Focuses exclusively on SBA-guaranteed lending; no alternative or non-SBA business loans mentioned

contact.address: 4558 Osage Beach Pkwy, Osage Beach, MO 65065

best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA 7(a) or 504 loans with established business operations
Franchise buyers and existing franchisees looking for specialized franchise financing
Healthcare practitioners (dentists, chiropractors, optometrists) needing practice loans
Construction companies, restaurants, and manufacturers requiring industry-specific financing
diagnosis: First Bank of the Lake is best suited for established small business owners and franchisees who qualify for SBA-backed financing and need specialized lending expertise in their industry. The main caveat is that all pricing, rates, and specific terms are only available through direct application or consultation, and the company exclusively offers SBA-guaranteed products, which may not suit businesses needing non-guaranteed or alternative financing structures.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 4558 Osage Beach Pkwy, Osage Beach, MO 65065
meta_description: Nationwide SBA lender ranked in top 1% with over $2 billion in small business loans since 2020, specializing in SBA financing.
